recommendations.title: The Truth About Emanuel
recommendations.overview: A troubled young woman becomes obsessed with her mysterious new neighbor, who bears a striking resemblance to the girl's dead mother.

recommendations.title: Silent House
recommendations.overview: Sarah returns with her father and uncle to fix up the family's longtime summerhouse after it was violated by squatters in the off-season. As they work in the dark, Sarah begins to hear sounds from within the walls of the boarded-up building. Although

recommendations.title: The Cellar
recommendations.overview: When Keira Woods' daughter mysteriously vanishes in the cellar of their new house in the country, she soon discovers there is an ancient and powerful entity controlling their home that she will have to face or risk losing her family's souls forever.

recommendations.title: Proxima
recommendations.overview: Sarah is a French astronaut training at the European Space Agency in Cologne. She is the only woman in the arduous program. She lives alone with Stella, her seven year old daughter. Sarah feels guilty that she cannot spend more time with her child. H

recommendations.title: The Face of Love
recommendations.overview: A widow falls for a guy who bears a striking resemblance to her late husband.

recommendations.title: Caddo Lake
recommendations.overview: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a series of past deaths and disappearances begin to link together, forever altering a broken family’s history.

recommendations.title: Torment
recommendations.overview: Newlyweds Cory and Sarah Morgan take Cory's 7-year-old son Liam up to the country for some much needed family time. When it appears as if Liam has run away, psychological suspense becomes straight-out horror, as Sarah and Cory must now confront a sad

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.

recommendations.title: Birth/Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A single mother and a childless morgue technician are bound together by their relationship to a little girl they have reanimated from the dead.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.
